devicefarm.project.DefaultJobTimeoutMinu.Description: Sets the execution timeout value (in minutes) for a project. All test runs in this project use the specified execution timeout value unless overridden when scheduling a run.

devicefarm.project.Tags.Description: The tags to add to the resource. A tag is an array of key-value pairs. Tag keys can have a maximum character length of 128 characters. Tag values can have a maximum length of 256 characters.
